title: デビュー戦の後に・荒

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just after the race...

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
D-did you see her run?! This is just her debut
race, right?!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: That's Narita Brian? She's so... wild.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Voices of astonishment spread like fire
throughout the audience.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But as for Narita Brian herself...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Not bad. No one backed off, so it was a real
fight until the very end.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Nothing. Let's talk about something else.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to run in the Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes
next.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Asahi Hai F.S. is a G1 race that attracts the
top junior racers. If I recall correctly, the distance
is 1,600 meters on a turf track.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, my sister ran there her junior year. I
also hear it's pretty tough.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Well, that's all for me. I'm going to bed.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'm tired. Wake me up when it's time to go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She collapses onto the sofa, looking abnormally
low-energy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I think back to how she looked during the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd thought she ran "wildly." But if I had to
pinpoint what was out of place...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hyah!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Agh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Right out of the gate, she was glaring at the other
runners, running as if she was hyper-aware of all
of them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seemed to be making a noticeable effort to
forcefully overpower the others by changing her
own pace whenever anyone came near her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She was exuding an unusual sense of intimidation
and competitiveness...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And now, that very same Narita Brian is resting on
the sofa behind me, sound asleep.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Excuse me. Is Brian he—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oh, she's asleep? Hehe, she looks just like she did
when she was little.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's Biwa Hayahide, Narita Brian's older sister and
an outstanding racer currently competing in the
Classic Triple Crown tour.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for taking care of my sister. I know she
can be self-centered, and a handful at times...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: But I hope you'll do your best to bear with her.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
She's happy to be somewhere she can
demonstrate her full abilities. She just has a funny
way of showing it.
choice_data_list:
Do you think she demonstrated her full abilities
today?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...Well, it was her debut.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure she must have been nervous. That's
probably why she didn't seem to be running like
her normal self.
choice_data_list: What do you mean by that?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Speaking as someone who used to compete with
her all the time, I can tell you her usual way of
running is much more terrifying.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Once the trigger is pulled, that's it. No matter
how far she runs, the thought of overtaking her
opponent never leaves her mind.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, sorry. I should simply be praising her,
considering she's my little sister.
choice_data_list: No, it's okay. This has been educational.
No, it's okay. This has been educational.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, my apologies. Now I've got you trying to
make me feel better.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But all in all, it was a good run. No one can do it
perfectly the first time.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
A lot of people used to keep their distance
because of her strength. It must've been a new
experience for her to run with so many others.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. Anyway, please take good care of her
moving forward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I'm watching Biwa Hayahide leave, I realize
how little I know about Narita Brian's past.
choice_data_list: I need to learn more about her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, I notice something while I'm taking another
look at Narita Brian's information.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She didn't take part in many scrimmages before
her debut race. I'm sure there are many factors
involved, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think that's what affected her this time. The
prospect of racing with so many other people
must've got to her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a result, she couldn't run like usual and ended
up extremely fatigued. What can I do to fix this?
